heroDescription: Explore Kling video generation models available through Novita AI model APIs. Compare supported variants, pricing, and model pages for production video workflows.
seoDescription: Explore Kling models on Novita AI, including text-to-video and image-to-video variants, pricing, API examples, and model pages.

capabilities.title: Text-to-video generation
capabilities.description: Generate video clips from text prompts with Kling model variants exposed through Novita AI APIs.

capabilities.title: Image-to-video workflows
capabilities.description: Animate source images and iterate on visual motion workflows with supported Kling image-to-video models.

capabilities.title: Production API access
capabilities.description: Use dedicated model pages to review API examples, pricing, and Playground access for each Kling variant.

lineupSections.title: Kling 2.x Series
lineupSections.description: Latest Kling model variants for higher-quality video generation workflows.

lineupSections.title: Kling 1.x Series
lineupSections.description: Established Kling variants for text-to-video and image-to-video generation.

whyNovitaTitle: Why run Kling on Novita AI

whyNovitaItems.title: One model API surface
whyNovitaItems.description: Access Kling alongside other image, video, and audio generation models through Novita AI.

whyNovitaItems.title: Model-specific SEO pages
whyNovitaItems.description: Each Kling variant links to a dedicated model page with examples, pricing, and Playground entry points.

whyNovitaItems.title: Usage-based pricing
whyNovitaItems.description: Model cards use the same product configuration and pricing source as the rest of Novita AI.

faq.question: What Kling models are available on Novita AI?
faq.answer: The collection page lists enabled Kling variants from Novita AI model configuration and links each model to its dedicated model page.

faq.question: Can I use Kling through an API?
faq.answer: Yes. Open an individual Kling model page to review API examples, pricing, and Playground access.

guidanceLinks.label: Model APIs overview
guidanceLinks.description: Start with the Novita AI model API guide.
